goal: Create a hello.py file that prints 'hello from my bot test' and write a pytest test to verify its functionality
scope: Create hello.py in the task working directory
Create a pytest test file (test_hello.py) to test hello.py
Ensure the module and test follow Python conventions
out_of_scope: Setting up additional testing infrastructure beyond pytest
Adding type hints or linting configuration
Creating documentation beyond the code itself

acceptance_criteria.check: python3 /Users/George/warden/tasks/t-bottest/workdir/hello.py | grep -q 'hello from my bot test'
acceptance_criteria.expected: Output should contain 'hello from my bot test'

acceptance_criteria.check: Does the test file properly verify that hello.py prints the expected output?
